hard_stops.logic: property information is required before disposition marketing can proceed
data room access has been granted without executed NDA — confidentiality breach risk
material items remain undisclosed in marketing materials — legal liability risk

soft_flags.logic: data room has fewer than 5 views in the last 7 days — buyer engagement is low
offering memorandum has not been approved — cannot distribute to buyers
property tour requests are pending — schedule promptly to maintain buyer interest
best and final offer deadline is within 7 days — ensure all bidders are notified
